calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Masenga appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the petition raises are a series of questions with respect to the extraordinary fees, that they are higher than what the Court usually approves for time doing ordinary work and that there are a substantial amount of travel costs. Mr. Masenga stated that he could have engaged a Professional Fiduciary, that he did this a favor to an Attorney in New York, that it would have been another $15,000.00 in fees and that the net savings to the estate is $10,000.00. Mr. Masenga also stated that he has nothing to add, that he has addressed this in the third amendment and that this is his hourly rate. The First and Final Report and Account of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Continued To Dec-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Masenga appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court questions whether Mr. Masenga would be taking fees out of the Mother's fee agreement with the Ukrainian Bar Association, how he became associated with this case, what his current standing to practice is and what other cases in San Francisco he has been involved in. Mr. Mesenga stated he will receive statutory fees for being the Administrator, that the reason he is in Proper Persona is because he does not want to incur double fees, that he has nothing to do with the Decedent's Mother and the Ukrainian Bar Association's agreement, that he was approached by Regina Rabinovich (Attorney in New York) and that he worked with Ms. Rabinovich's Father in the past. Mr. Masenga also stated that the statutory fee is the only fee he will receive, that he did not know if Probate Code 8465(d) is a concern of the Court, that he did not solicate the nomination and that he has been in good standing for the last fifteen years. In addition, Mr. Masenga stated that he just completed a case in San Francisco (PES-17-300549 The Estate of Efim Rytikow), that a final account order was entered in that case on June 19, 2018, that he has no relationship to the Decedent or the Beneficiary of the Estate, that he received one statutory fee in that case, that Rytikow's Niece was in Russia and the Ukrainian Bar Association was not involved, that the fee agreement was directly between Rabinovich and the Niece. Furthermore, Mr. Masenga stated that he believes Ms. Rabinovich will be paid a portion of the fee by the Ukrainian Bar Association. The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Masenga in propria persona (petitioner) via Court Call

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Masenga to provide proof of the relationship between the mother and the decedent, a formal translation of the nomination by the mother nominating him, a declaration of how he became involved in this case, an whether anyone has been assigned any shares of this estate. Mr. Masenga made reference to the supplement to petition filed on March 16, 2018.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To Apr-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
